views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's gratitude progress (X/3), current streak flame, mood snapshot, and a quick-add FAB. Features a scrollable card of recent entries and a mini calendar heatmap for the current week.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal. Large text field for the gratitude item, horizontal scrollable category chips, a 1-3 depth slider with labels (Noticed / Meaningful / Profound), and mood picker. Shows how many of today's 3 are done as progress dots.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped list of past entries with a calendar heatmap at top. Each day card shows the 3 gratitude items with their category icons. Filter by category or mood. Search through past entries.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Rich analytics: category distribution pie chart, mood trend line over weeks, depth distribution bar chart, streak history, weekly completion rate trend, and AI-style insights like 'You're most grateful for People on weekends' and 'Your longest streak was 23 days'.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All gratitude entries logged today, sorted by creation time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of gratitude items logged today (0-3+)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's progress toward daily goal of 3, clamped to 0.0-1.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least 3 gratitude entries, counting back from today/yesterday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest streak of consecutive days meeting the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Lifetime count of all gratitude entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalActiveDays
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total unique days with at least one entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of days this week (Mon-Sun) where user logged at least 3 items

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDepth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean depth score across all entries (1.0-3.0 scale)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entry count per category, sorted descending, for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood score over last 30 days for line chart. Mood ordinal: joyful=5, content=4, peaceful=4, hopeful=3, reflective=2, neutral=1

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyEntryTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Entries per week for last 8 weeks, for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: depthDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries at each depth level: Noticed (1), Meaningful (2), Profound (3)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most frequently used category across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dominantMood
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most common mood across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated natural-language insights: streak milestones, category patterns by day-of-week, depth trends, mood-category correlations, comparison to previous week

dailyGoal.description: Number of gratitude items to log per day

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if the user logged at least 3 gratitude entries (meeting the daily goal). The streak counts consecutive qualifying days backward from today (or yesterday if today has no entries yet).
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track weekly completion rate (days meeting goal / 7) compared to previous week. Track average depth score week-over-week to see if reflections are getting deeper. Track mood distribution shifts — are positive moods becoming more frequent over time? Compare category diversity: are they expanding or narrowing their gratitude focus?
insights: Category-by-day-of-week patterns (e.g., 'You appreciate People most on weekends')
Depth trend (e.g., 'Your reflections have been getting deeper — average depth up 0.4 this month')
Mood-category correlation (e.g., 'Entries about Nature correlate with your most joyful moods')
Weekly comparison (e.g., 'You logged 18 gratitudes this week vs 12 last week — 50% increase!')
Consistency recognition (e.g., 'You've completed your daily 3 every day this week')
Diversity nudge (e.g., '80% of your entries are about People — try noticing Nature or Experiences')
Lookback prompt (e.g., 'One month ago you were grateful for... [random past entry]')
